<!--
Thanks for contributing to AvaKit! Please fill out the sections below.
Keep the title a clear, one-sentence description of what the change does.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? Link any related issue (e.g. "Closes #123"). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New / updated template
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / internal (no user-facing change)
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] Added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) if this change is user-facing
- [ ] Updated docs (`README.md`, `docs/`, or a template's `CLAUDE.md`/`llms.txt`) if behavior changed
- [ ] Follows the project conventions in [`docs/11-conventions.md`](../docs/11-conventions.md) (English only, shadcn/ui only, Framer Motion / GSAP only)

## How was this tested?

<!-- Commands you ran, templates you smoke-tested (scripts/smoke-template.sh <id>),
     manual verification, etc. -->
